The '''Serob system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], near [[Karlatt]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serob 6]].

==Appearances==
*{{BackstabCite|30|La Révolte d'Acier: Épisode 3 - À la recherche du Temple Maudit}}
